_meta.tool: get_trade_call (+ get_trade_signal alias — same producer getTradeSignal)
_meta.purpose: Public-response-shape SoT after the ADDITIVE `_receipts` inline-proof block. Supersedes get-trade-call-shape-snapshot-2026-06-04.json. ADDITIVE-ONLY: top level gains `_receipts` (sibling of `_algovault`); content gains a 2nd text item (the human receipt) — content[0] is byte-unchanged (still the JSON envelope). NO existing field removed/renamed (Data Integrity). outcome_return_pct / Phase-E outcome WR must NEVER appear anywhere in `_receipts` (allow-list, not deny-list).

new_in_this_wave._receipts: ADDITIVE top-level block. Present on every external (non-internal) perp call incl. HOLD; OMITTED on internal grid-refresh cells and on the equity engine (perp-only scope). Projected once via formatReceipts() (single-derivation with the verdict).
new_in_this_wave._receipts.conviction_pct: the live 0-100 engine confidence (integer), shown on EVERY call incl. HOLD (Mr.1 2026-06-20). NOT a probability of profit.
new_in_this_wave._receipts.factors: top 2-3 salient drivers; each {factor, direction: bullish|bearish|neutral, value}. trend_persistence + funding_state always present; 3rd = IMMINENT breakout else a >=0.5% OI move.
new_in_this_wave._receipts.track_record: LIVE {pfe_win_rate (fraction 0-1), n (EVALUATED count), window 'YYYY-MM-DD..YYYY-MM-DD', as_of ISO} from the in-process performance source behind performance://signal-performance (cached warmer, NOT an HTTP self-call). OMITTED entirely fail-open when the source is unavailable — never a stale hardcoded number.
new_in_this_wave._receipts.verification_uri: ALWAYS https://algovault.com/track-record (aggregate proof page). NEVER a per-call /verify/<id> — ad-hoc live calls are not individually Merkle-anchored (that is OPS-PERCALL-VERIFY-ANCHOR-W1).
new_in_this_wave._receipts.disclaimer: Compliance anchor in the STRUCTURED block only; NOT printed in the per-call human text.
new_in_this_wave.content[1]: ADDITIVE 2nd MCP text item = the human-readable receipt (verdict / Why / Proof lines), projected from the same _receipts. content[0] remains the JSON envelope unchanged.

human_text_contract.line_1_verdict: ${verdict} · ${conviction_pct}% conviction — ${humanized regime}   e.g. 'BUY · 55% conviction — Trending up'
human_text_contract.line_3_proof: Proof: ${pfe%}% PFE win rate · ${humanized n} calls · Merkle-anchored on Base · Verify → https://algovault.com/track-record   (ONLY when track_record present)
human_text_contract.no_disclaimer_line: the per-call human text NEVER prints the disclaimer (Mr.1: redundant per call).

error_contract.INSUFFICIENT_CANDLES: {error:'INSUFFICIENT_CANDLES', error_code, message, candles_available, candles_required, suggested_timeframes:[], suggested_action} — isError:true
error_contract.TRADFI_SYMBOL_UNSUPPORTED_ON_VENUE: {error_code, message, coin, requested_exchange, suggested_venues:[], probed_at} — isError:true
error_contract.TIER_LIMIT_REACHED: {code, error_code, message, current_usage, monthly_limit, tier, suggested_upgrade_url, retry_after_days} — isError:true
error_contract.note: Error envelopes carry NO _receipts (only successful verdicts do).

cache_contract: no server-side response cache; verdict computed per-call from live adapter candles + funding. _receipts.track_record is read from a process-cached in-process snapshot refreshed every 15m by startReceiptTrackRecordWarmer() (fail-open to omitted).
consumers: MCP agent callers (Claude/Cursor/ChatGPT/etc.) via tools/call — read _receipts (structured) + the human receipt text item
algovault-bot (Telegram) — parses content[0] JSON (unaffected; content[0] byte-position preserved)
future P2 landing verdict card — consumes the same _receipts shape + the RECEIPTS_*_TOOLTIP copy
src/lib/cross-asset-grid.ts (internal grid refresh; receives NO _receipts — internal calls skip it)
additive_only_rule: top level may GAIN `_receipts` but never LOSE/RENAME any of the 12 pre-existing keys; content[0] stays the JSON envelope (position + parseability preserved). A removed/renamed key, a forbidden_key under _receipts, or a per-call /verify/<id> verification_uri = Data Integrity / Factuality violation → HALT.
drift_check_command: cd /Users/tank/code/crypto-quant-signal-mcp && npx vitest run tests/unit/receipts.test.ts   # allow-list canary (no outcome_*), single-derivation property (human verdict === _receipts.verdict), verification_uri === track-record URL
live_probe_command: SID=$(curl -s -D- -o/dev/null -X POST https://api.algovault.com/mcp -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: application/json, text/event-stream' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"drift","version":"1"}}}' | tr -d '\r' | awk -F': ' '/^mcp-session-id/{print $2}'); curl -s -X POST https://api.algovault.com/mcp -H "Mcp-Session-Id: $SID" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: application/json, text/event-stream' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"notifications/initialized"}' >/dev/null; curl -s -X POST https://api.algovault.com/mcp -H "Mcp-Session-Id: $SID" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: application/json, text/event-stream' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_trade_call","arguments":{"coin":"BTC","timeframe":"15m"}}}' | grep -o '_receipts[^}]*conviction_pct[^,]*'   # expect _receipts present with conviction_pct + verification_uri == https://algovault.com/track-record; assert NO outcome_return_pct
